summary: Final comprehensive frontend testing of Allogo Taxi App. All major pages load correctly. Language switching FR/EN works on Landing page and Profile page. Auth, Passenger Dashboard, Driver Dashboard, Wallet, History, Admin Dashboard, and Admin Promo Codes pages all functional.

issues: Mixed language content - some text in French ('Je suis un(e)', 'Créez votre compte Allogo') while form labels and buttons are in English. Language preference not fully applied to all elements.
The 'Devenir chauffeur' button on landing page doesn't translate to English when EN language is selected

passed_tests: ✅ Landing Page loads correctly with Allogo branding
✅ Language selector visible in header (data-testid='language-selector')
✅ Language switching EN -> FR works - hero text changes from 'Your ride, in a flash' to 'Votre course, en un éclair'
✅ Language switching FR -> EN works - text reverts correctly
✅ Login button text changes with language (Login/Connexion)
✅ Primary CTA button changes with language (Book a ride/Réserver une course)
✅ Header login button navigates to /auth
✅ Auth page login form displays correctly with email/password inputs
✅ Passenger login (passenger@test.com/password) successful - navigates to /passenger
✅ Passenger Dashboard loads with map and booking form
✅ Passenger menu opens with nav items: Mon profil, Historique, Mon Portefeuille, etc.
✅ Profile page loads with user info (Jean Dupont, 5.0 rating)
✅ Profile page language selector with FR/EN buttons works (data-testid='lang-fr-btn', 'lang-en-btn')
✅ Wallet page (/wallet) loads with balance display (0.00€)
✅ Wallet page top-up button visible (data-testid='topup-btn')
✅ Wallet page transaction history displays correctly
✅ History page (/history) loads with ride list and PDF export button
✅ Driver login (driver@test.com/password) successful - navigates to /driver
✅ Driver Dashboard loads with stats cards (earnings, rides, rating)
✅ Driver availability switch visible (data-testid='availability-switch')
✅ Driver menu opens with nav items: Mon profil, Mon véhicule, Historique, Déconnexion
✅ Admin login (admin@volttaxi.com/admin123) successful - navigates to /admin
✅ Admin Dashboard shows stats (Passagers, Chauffeurs, Revenus totaux, Courses terminées)
✅ Admin Dashboard shows driver statistics table with actions
✅ Admin Promo Codes page (/admin/promo-codes) loads correctly
✅ Admin Promo Codes shows existing codes list with usage stats
✅ Admin Promo Codes create button works (data-testid='create-promo-btn')
✅ Admin Promo Codes create modal displays with form inputs
action_items: Minor: Fix mixed language on Auth page - 'Je suis un(e)' and 'Créez votre compte Allogo' should translate to English when EN language is selected
Minor: 'Devenir chauffeur' button on Landing page should translate to 'Become a driver' when EN language is selected
critical_code_review_comments: Translation keys for some static text in AuthPage.js ('Je suis un(e)', 'Accédez à votre compte Allogo', 'Créez votre compte Allogo') are not using i18n t() function
LandingPage.js 'Devenir chauffeur' button text is hardcoded without t() translation wrapper

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all pages load and function correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: All major frontend features working. Language switching works on Landing page header and Profile page. Auth page has minor translation gaps where some French text doesn't translate to English. All dashboard pages (Passenger, Driver, Admin) load correctly. Wallet with top-up and transaction history works. Admin promo codes page with create/delete functionality works. PDF export button visible on History page.

features_verified.landing_page: WORKING - Hero section, feature cards, language selector, navigation
features_verified.language_switching: WORKING - FR/EN toggle updates most text correctly
features_verified.auth_page_login: WORKING - Email/password login for all roles
features_verified.auth_page_register: WORKING - Registration form with role selection (minor translation issue)
features_verified.passenger_dashboard: WORKING - Map, booking form, vehicle/passenger selection
features_verified.passenger_menu: WORKING - Profile, Scheduled, History, Payments, Wallet, Logout
features_verified.profile_page: WORKING - User info, language selector with FR/EN buttons
features_verified.wallet_page: WORKING - Balance display, top-up button, transaction history
features_verified.history_page: WORKING - Ride history list, PDF export button
features_verified.driver_dashboard: WORKING - Stats, availability toggle, available rides section
features_verified.admin_dashboard: WORKING - Stats cards, driver management table, recent rides
features_verified.admin_promo_codes: WORKING - List view, search, create modal, delete functionality
